data.location: 2777 S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89109
data.short_description: New restaurant from Mexican Chef Gabriela Cámara at Fontainebleau Las Vegas on the Strip. Features signature seafood preparations and contemporary Mexican cantina classics. Reservations are available via Resy.

data.location: 3599 Atlanta Rd SE, Suite 7, Smyrna, GA 30080
data.short_description: Fast-growing charcuterie franchise opening a 1,040-square-foot location in the Paces Centre shopping plaza in the Cumberland area. Owned and operated by Toni and Julio Hewitt, offering premium charcuterie boards and catering.
Brazilian steakhouse chain's third Georgia location, opened near the Mall of Georgia. To mark the opening, 10% of first week's sales will be donated to the North Gwinnett Co-Op.

data.status: nearing completion and is expected to debut
data.short_description: Colorado-born G-Que BBQ's fifth brick-and-mortar location, a 4,000-square-foot restaurant in Timnath's Ladera mixed-use development. Features a 170-seat restaurant, patio, and a "Que-Thru" mobile pick-up lane.

Entertainment eatery and venue set to open in Sugar Land's Imperial District, featuring a 26ft screen, 20+ TVs, kid zones, dog park, 21+ rooftop, and live music. Construction began October 2024 and is expected to wrap by July 2025.

data.location: Address not specified (San Antonio, TX; 1-10 and 1-604 area preferred)
data.short_description: Plano-based quesadilla chain planning its first San Antonio location as part of its 2026 expansion. The owners are still searching for the best location in San Antonio.

Philadelphia-based dessert chain has filed a permit for a new Charlotte location at Ayrsley Town Blvd, which would be its fifth in the Charlotte area. The brand opened 55 new bakeries in 2025 and aims for 75 this year.

data.location: 4070 W University Dr, Suite 100, McKinney, TX 75071
data.short_description: Fast-casual Hawaiian-style restaurant filing paperwork for a 1,900 sq ft McKinney location. Construction is set to begin September 7, 2026, with an opening target of late summer or early fall.

data.location: Address not specified (Las Vegas, NV; mobile)
data.short_description: Alaskan-based mobile cotton candy cart filing a City of Las Vegas permit to operate at festivals and fairs throughout the Las Vegas Valley. No fixed address; appearances announced via social media.

Japanese-Mexican fusion restaurant with a speakeasy-style cocktail bar on Manhattan's Lower East Side, operated by Ao Dining Management Inc. Features a high-energy dining room and an intimate bar setting.
Jolly Pumpkin's Midtown Detroit taproom is closing after approximately 11 years in the neighborhood. The brand has announced a new Detroit location is forthcoming.

Ann Arbor's fast-casual Mediterranean restaurant Spiedo is opening a second location in Detroit's Midtown, taking over the former Jolly Pumpkin space. Owner Brad Greenhill plans to debut the location sometime this summer.

Northern Colorado chicken wing chain opening its 16th location in a former Fuzzy's Taco Shop space in Thornton, marking its Denver Metro debut. The 3,600 sq ft location will have indoor seating, a patio, and a full bar.

data.location: 8 W Campbell St, Arlington Heights, IL 60005
data.short_description: Family-owned acai bowl shop opening its first brick-and-mortar location in downtown Arlington Heights, after years of operating at local farmers markets. An opening date has not yet been announced.

Belgian-inspired bakery and cafe planning a 4,200-square-foot Kirkland location at the Modera Bridle Trails apartments. Construction is expected to begin in late 2026 following the brand's March 2026 Woodinville debut.
Golf simulator sports bar brand opening a new location in downtown Roswell as part of its multi-location 2026 expansion. Features indoor golf simulators and a full food and beverage menu.
Second of two new Atlanta-area locations for the golf simulator sports bar brand, opening in Dunwoody Village. Features indoor golf simulators and a full food and beverage menu.

data.location: 15 Thomas Grace Annex Lane, Suite 200, Sharpsburg, GA (no zip code provided)
data.short_description: Mexican restaurant opening its second location in Sharpsburg, featuring the same menu as the existing location including tacos, fajitas, and seafood. The expansion aims to sustain their growing customer base.
Stockyard Burgers & Bones is being replaced by its sister concept Cotto Modern Italian at Vinings Jubilee. No opening date specified in the article.

data.status: coming to the village this year
data.short_description: New coffee concept planned for Evanston in 2026, offering coffee and snacks with French-inspired menu items. Owner Maxime Bernard states the opening date is TBD as the construction timeline is unknown.
Washington-based ice cream chain opening its first Kirkland location and 12th store overall, in a 1,400 sq ft space. The brand is known for sourcing 90% of ingredients from the Pacific Northwest.
Dallas bar and restaurant announced its closure on March 28, 2026, after roughly a decade in operation since 2015. The final day of service is April 4, 2026.

data.store_name: High Grounds Lounge (Death of the Fox Brewing Company)
data.location: 18 N Golfwood Ave, Carneys Point, NJ 08069
data.status: targeting an April debut, pending approvals
data.short_description: Death of the Fox Brewing Company's third location, High Grounds Lounge, will co-locate with The Frosted Mug in Carney's Point, NJ. It will serve as the brand's first full-service cafe and roastery co-located with a dispensary.

data.status: permanently closed (implied; last date confirmed March 28)
data.short_description: Miami seafood restaurant announced its closure after over ten years in business since 2014. Owner Danny Serfer shared the news in a heartfelt social media post thanking staff and loyal customers.

non_working.reason: Multi-business roundup article; extracted all four named businesses (Atlanta Golf & Social ×2, Frida's Grill and Bar, Cotto Modern Italian) as separate rows. Note: the article excerpt is cut off and may contain a fifth business not fully visible in the provided text.
